headline: BAE Systems provides advanced aircraft readiness with new Link 16 test capability for F-16

headline: Trump’s China Summit Could Mean Big Things for Boeing, Tesla and Nvidia
summary: All eyes are on Beijing this week as President Donald Trump meets with China’s Xi Jinping to discuss everything from soybeans to AI chips.  Markets have muted expectations for U.S. President Donald Trump’s talks with Chinese leader Xi Jinping today, but a topsy-turvy geopolitical order is still enough to keep investors on their toes.  The two global superpowers have gathered in Beijing to discuss everything from AI chips to the Strait of Hormuz and the future of Taiwan.

headline: What to Expect From the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing
summary: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump became the first US leader in almost a decade to visit China when he landed in Beijing on Wednesday. His much-anticipated two-day summit with President Xi Jinping — delayed from March due to the Iran war — offers the leaders of the world’s two largest economies a chance to reset personal ties and look for common ground on trade, technology and a range of other contentious topics. headline: Trump meets Xi: Can a ‘Board of Trade’ help reset U.S.-China ties?
summary: James Zimmerman, Chairman of AmCham China, says the most meaningful outcome of the Trump-Xi summit may be structural — possibly the newly proposed Board of Trade, a dedicated platform for both sides to work through trade disputes, and one that could give businesses the predictability and guardrails they have long been waiting for.
